bug.description: race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization

prompt:
There is a race condition on shared data accessed from multiple threads without synchronization downstream of function pack_rf_config_info in the nfapi/open-nFAPI/common subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/open-nFAPI/common/src/nfapi.c:1465.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
